title: 宝塚記念の後に・恐れぬ者は斯く語り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Inari One confronts Yaeno Muteki
and accuses her of holding back, but Yaeno
claims she gave it everything she had.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno asks me if I also think that she's not giving
it her all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I admit that I feel the same and that it might have
something to do with how she tames her blaze
fierce with water still.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she stops holding herself back, she could add a
powerful weapon to her arsenal. But it would
come with the risk of her being overwhelmed by
her emotions and losing control.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki grows quiet. After a while, she says
she'd like to think it over while training for the
upcoming autumn Tenno Sho.
